task_steps:
1. Configure Family Tree Branch (i.e. Root)
  2. Configure Family Tree Branch (i.e. Root) Photo
  3. Configure Family Tree Branch (i.e. Root) Descendants
  4. Data Entry (Family Tree Branch (i.e. Root) Narrative
  5. Display Family Tree Branch (i.e. Root) Profile
  6. Display Family Tree Branch (i.e. Root) Descendant Names
task_price_frequency:
• Per Branch
  • One-time Family Tree Branch Set/Up Charge.

task_steps:
1. Enable Descendant (Pay Per Click)
  2. Display Descendant Profile on Click
task_price_frequency:
• Per Click.
  • The Following fields Are Displayed:


    1. Descendant Photo
    2. Computed Age
    3. Year Born
      • If Deceased?
        • An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased
        • Year Died
        • and Age at Death
      • Are also Displayed.

task_steps:
1. Data Entry (Descendant Narrative)
  2. Display Descendant's Narrative when Descendant's MyStory Link is Clicked
task_price_frequency:
• Per Family Tree Descendant Narrative.
  • (Up to 3 revisions before additional charge due).

• Per Hour.
  • (Up to 3 revisions before additional charge due).

task_steps: 1. Family Tree Planter Vase (with Mother Lovie Decal)
